scripts.prepare:markets:mainnet: mustache config/markets/networks/mainnet.json config/markets/subgraph.template.yaml > subgraph.yaml && mustache config/markets/networks/mainnet.json config/markets/constants.template.ts > src/constants/static.ts && mustache config/markets/metadata.json config/markets/pipeline.template.yaml > royco-day-markets-pipeline.yaml
scripts.build: npm run prepare:markets:mainnet && npm run codegen && graph build
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: npm run prepare:markets:mainnet && npm run codegen && graph test -v 0.6.0
scripts.check: npm run check:drift && npm run test
